root.sql: select sc_rep_scq_form2.operate_date, sc_rep_scq_form2.loan_group, sc_rep_scq_form2.loan_desc, sc_rep_scq_form2.principal_balance, sc_rep_scq_form2.emer_due, sc_rep_scq_form2.emer_3lt, sc_rep_scq_form2.emer_3gt, sc_rep_scq_form2.norm_due, sc_rep_scq_form2.norm_3lt, sc_rep_scq_form2.norm_3gt, sc_rep_scq_form2.spec_due, sc_rep_scq_form2.spec_3lt, sc_rep_scq_form2.spec_3gt from sc_rep_scq_form2 where 1 = 1 /*WHERE*/ order by sc_rep_scq_form2.loan_group, sc_rep_scq_form2.loan_item
